name: Abatement of Penalty Due to Erroneous Written Advice

eligibility.description: The advice must have been in response to a specific written request by the taxpayer and based on accurate information provided by the taxpayer.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS is required to abate any penalty or addition to tax that resulted from a taxpayer's reasonable reliance on erroneous written advice provided by an IRS employee.
